metadata.title: Grocery Store | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered grocery store management platform for all your retail operations — from point of sale and inventory management to loyalty programs and expiration tracking.

hero.title: Grocery Stores
hero.description: AdonERP contains an intuitive, easy-to-set-up Point of Sale, and allows you to streamline purchasing, sales, inventory management, accounting, and B2C/B2B sales from one platform.
hero.testimonialQuote: I have used other programs before, but AdonERP has a variety of layers that make it easier to work. From expiration tracking to loyalty programs, everything just works.

loyaltySection.title: Convenient shopping to boost
loyaltySection.description: Promotions and discounts offer customers flexible shopping experiences, while loyalty programs help them keep coming back.

expirationSection.title: Expiration dates
expirationSection.description: Track product expiration dates, manage lots and serial numbers, and reduce waste with better inventory visibility. Never sell expired products again.

replenishmentSection.title: Flawless Replenishment
replenishmentSection.description: Never run out of stock with automated purchase orders and smart replenishment rules.

scanSection.description: Scan products to speed up inventory transfers, receiving, checkout, and product traceability. Works with any barcode scanner.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Powerful grocery tools for daily sales, stock management, and reporting.

list.title: Payment providers
list.description: Accept multiple payment methods including cards, e-wallets, and contactless.

list.title: Multiple cashiers
list.description: Manage several cashier accounts with badges or PIN codes.

list.title: Integrated accounting
list.description: Seamless accounting integration for real-time financial tracking.

list.title: Bills reloading
list.description: Easily reload and manage utility bill payments for customers.

list.title: Loyalty programs
list.description: Reward returning customers with points and exclusive discounts.

list.title: Reporting
list.description: Track sales trends, bestsellers, and stock performance in one place.

appsSection.title: One
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your grocery operation, finance, supplier flows, and customer communication.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.content: I have used other programs before, but AdonERP has a variety of layers that make it easier to work. From expiration tracking to loyalty programs, everything just works.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: The integrated POS and inventory management saved us hours of manual work. Our perishable waste reduced by 30% since we started tracking expiration dates.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for grocery retailers.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a grocery store workflow that helps your team sell faster, manage inventory smarter, and reduce waste with expiration tracking.
